PreToolUse.description: Block high-confidence catastrophic shell commands (rm -rf /, force-push to main, curl|sh, dd to disk, mkfs, chmod -R 777, fork bomb); warn on git reset --hard / git clean -f. Kill switch: NXTLVL_DANGEROUS_BASH=off.

PostToolUse.description: Two-stage context awareness: a primary FYI when live context crosses NXTLVL_CONTEXT_ALERT_TOKENS (default 200k), then a notify-only backstop at NXTLVL_CONTEXT_ALERT_BACKSTOP_TOKENS (default 325k). NXTLVL_CONTEXT_ALERT_NOTIFY=off suppresses the macOS notification; NXTLVL_CONTEXT_ALERT=off disables entirely.

UserPromptSubmit.description: Auto-title each session as "<folder> · <branch>" (folder-only when not on a branch), refreshed on every prompt so the title tracks branch changes mid-session. Never blocks the prompt. Kill switch: NXTLVL_SESSION_TITLE=off.
